title: Paldean Tauros (Combat) Battle Guide
summary: A pure [Fighting] physical attacker — [intimidate] support with 110 Attack and 100 Speed, built around [close-combat] STAB and spread utility.
strengths: 110 Attack and 100 Speed enable fast STAB hits
bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Paldean Tauros (Combat Breed) is a pure [Fighting] physical attacker with [intimidate] — offering both support utility and 110 Attack / 100 Speed offensive profile. Unlike the base form, this variant leans into [Fighting] STAB and dual spread moves ([rock-slide] + [earthquake]) for doubles efficiency.

## Strengths
[intimidate] gives immediate tempo value on entry. 110 Attack and 100 Speed put it in a strong offensive tier, and [close-combat] is hard to switch into with [Dark], [Normal], [Rock], [Steel], and [Ice] all taking super-effective hits. [rock-slide] + [earthquake] combo covers both opposing Pokemon simultaneously in doubles.

## Weaknesses & Answers
[Flying], [Psychic], and [Fairy] are all common weakness types in the meta. Mono [Fighting] means STAB coverage ends at one type, and switch-ins like [tapu-fini] shut down [close-combat].

## Recommended Moveset
[close-combat] is the main STAB. [rock-slide] covers [Flying] and adds flinch pressure. [earthquake] is the spread coverage move. [protect] is mandatory in doubles.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[life-orb] is the default. [choice-scarf] gives more speed control. [intimidate] is locked. Tera [Fighting] stacks STAB; Tera [Fire] patches the [Flying] weakness to a resistance.

## Teammates & Synergy
Pair with [Electric], [Dark], or [Bug] to cover [Flying] and [Psychic]. [tailwind] support helps it outpace scarfers. [follow-me] protects setup turns.

## Play Patterns
Lead to trigger [intimidate], then spam [close-combat] into neutral targets. Use [rock-slide] for doubles spread flinches, and [earthquake] in double-Ground strategies. Switch out against [Psychic] or [Fairy] leads.
